english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ كُنْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْحُجَّةِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ
english translation text: O Allah, Be for Your deputy the Hujjat, son of Hassan

arabic text: صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلى آبائِهِ,في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ وَفي كُلِّ ساعَةٍ
english translation text: may Your blessings be upon him and his forefathers now and at all times
a guardian, a protector, a leader, a helper, a proof and an eye.
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to You),
and cause him to live in it for a long time.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
